title: Fix mob gen loading screen visibility

log.context: Fix mob gen loading screen visibility

Done. Here's what was done:

**Fix applied: server-side delay in `/mnt/data/commons-server/src/index.ts`**

The `d_start` handler was sending `d_mob_progress` (status: `complete`) and then immediately calling `initFloor()`, which caused `d_floor` to arrive on the client almost simultaneously — making the loading overlay appear and vanish before the user could see it.

The fix wraps `initFloor(started)` in a `setTimeout(..., 800)`, giving the client 800ms of guaranteed overlay visibility before t...(truncated)
